Article.ArticleTitle: Diverse exercise modalities in alleviating osteoporosis: A narrative review.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Physical Education, Southwest Medical University, Luzhou, PR China.
School of Sports Medicine, Wuhan Sports University, Wuhan, PR China. lrh1872076@163.com.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: The authors declare no competing interests.
